diagram_title: Claude Provider Native Plugin — A0 Context

activities.title: Extract Protocol Specification
activities.description: Reverse-engineer official claude-code binary to extract all protocol constants, packet formats, hash algorithms, and handshake sequences. Produces normative datasheets that serve as the single source of truth for C plugin implementation.

activities.title: Manage Authentication Lifecycle
activities.description: Handle OAuth PKCE authorization, token exchange, credential storage, and token refresh. Maintains authenticated session state for API requests.

activities.title: Assemble Request Packet
activities.description: Transform raw API request into a wire-format HTTP packet that is byte-identical to official claude-code output. Includes header assembly, body transform, URL rewrite, and attribution computation.

activities.title: Execute Transport Exchange
activities.description: Send assembled HTTP request via TLS transport, receive SSE stream, parse events, strip response-side protocol artifacts (mcp_ prefix), and deliver structured events to host.

activities.title: Validate Packet Conformance
activities.description: Compare C plugin request output against official binary test vectors. Detect and report any byte-level deviation in headers, body, or URL.
